Reviews Contact

About Legacy Solar

12+ years serving San Diego and surrounding areas

Founded by local electricians who saw San Diego's untapped solar potential, Legacy Solar specializes in high-performance systems tailored to our unique climate. From Spanish revival roofs in North Park to mid-century ranches in Escondido, we know how to maximize energy production on every architecture.

We combine German engineering with California craftsmanship, using only microinverters and marine-grade mounting to withstand salty Pacific breezes. Every design starts with a shade analysis specific to your neighborhood's sun patterns.

As proud sponsors of San Diego River cleanup efforts and Solar for Schools programs, we're committed to making renewable energy accessible across all 920 ZIP codes.

12+ Years in Business
800+ Projects Completed
97% Client Satisfaction
20+ Team Members
Legacy Solar

Trusted solar professionals serving San Diego, CA and the surrounding areas. Quality work, honest pricing, guaranteed satisfaction.

555-sol-r94
